name: Sensor Simulator
Decision Logic
FORMAT SQL
func:
/**
 * FORMAT SQL NODE
 * Purpose: Map flat simulation data to specific PostgreSQL columns.
 */
const d = msg.payload;

msg.query = `
    INSERT INTO sensor_readings (
        device_id, 
        sensor_id, 
        tick, 
        status, 
        anomaly_score, 
        decision_reason, 
        sensors, 
        timestamp
    ) 
    VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8);
`;

msg.params = [
    d.machine_id,
    d.machine_type,
    d.tick,
    d.status,
    d.anomaly_score,
    JSON.stringify(d.decision_reason), // Store reasons as JSONB array
    JSON.stringify(d.sensors),         // Store sensor object as JSONB
    d.timestamp
];

return msg;
